title: NovaLite Visuals
description: This is a texture pack made by me, for people who want to use shaders but their device cant handle it. This pack recreates a shader-like feel (also uses core-shaders for shadows and lighting) whilst maintaing good performance with little to no fps drops!
body:
So ever wanted to use shaders while playing Minecraft but your device cant handle it? Well this texture pack is for you! It adds Beautiful realistic skyboxes, uses core shaders for realistic shadows, vibrant colors, all without losing much fps! Perfect for playing with friends, or just for fun too!
This is my first ever texture pack and there may be glitches (one of them being the title image quality) but i will keep updating it!

Dependencies:
Mod Skyboxify For the custom skyboxes to load
Mod Polytone For custom colors to load
Sodium core Shader Support (IMPORTANT) For realistic lighting and vibrance.

Other useful Mods (not required, just for qol):
Mod Menu to see all of the mods u have!

Thank You for using my texture pack!!!!! Hope u enjoy :3
